name: Hainan Yatai Industrial Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Hainan Yatai Industrial Development Co., Ltd. develops and sells real estate properties. It markets its houses in Yongdeng County, Lanzhou City through online sales channels. The company was formerly known as Hainan United Oils & Technologies Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hainan Yatai Industrial Development Co., Ltd. in February 2010. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Lanzhou, China. As of March 31, 2009, Hainan Yatai Industrial Development Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Lanzhou Yatai Industry and Trade Group Co., Ltd.
